titles.title: Praise the Lord Am In His Plan

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Praise the Lord, He knows my name All that I have is His to control Praise the Lord am in His plan.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He knew me before I knew Him He knew just what I’ll go through He wrote my name in the Lamb’s Book of Life Praise the Lord, am in His plan.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He had a good plan of my life Before I thought of having one He took me out of denominational chains Praise the Lord am in His plan.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Praise the Lord, I am in His plan No matter what may come on my way With the world falling He’ll hide me in His land Praise the Lord, am in His plan.
